# opnsense_quagga_bgp_redistribution (Resource)

Manages a BGP route redistribution entry on OPNsense (FRR). Requires the `os-frr` plugin.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `redistribute` (String) Source to redistribute into BGP: `ospf`, `connected`, `kernel`, `rip`, `static`.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this redistribution is enabled. Defaults to `true`.
- `route_map` (String) UUID of a route map to apply to redistributed routes.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID.
